payment_terms: 70% payment upon confirmation and signing of contract.
30% balance upon handover before show starts
standard_notes: The above contract does not include application fees to any relevant authorities and electrical connection fees.
Any changes in design during the progress of work will delay completion schedule and it shall be deemed at the cost of the Client.
Any changes agreed upon after the confirmation of contract or during the work in progress shall be deemed as Additional Orders.
All designs and dimensions are subject to final site verification.
For production purpose, quotation must be confirmed minimum 20 working days before date of event
20% surcharge will be implied on the graphic cost, if the graphic files are not received latest by five working days before build up date.
Design and Artwork of the graphics are not included in this contract.
Cancellation of agreement is subject to 75% of the agreement amount.
All deposit are non-refundable upon of cancellation of agreement.
quote_text.acceptance_text: We accept the quotation amount and the terms

default_quote_basis.surfaces: Confirm: Please confirm visible walls, fascia, arches, beams, columns, and painted finishes.
default_quote_basis.counters: Confirm: Please confirm counter, cabinet, and countertop material/finish.
default_quote_basis.platform: Confirm: Please confirm platform height, platform coverage, and flooring finish.
default_quote_basis.graphics: Confirm: Please confirm graphic panels, logo signage, lightboxes, and printed features.
default_quote_basis.furniture: Confirm: Please confirm furniture, plants, green walls, AV, and rental items.
default_quote_basis.electrical: Confirm: Please confirm lights, 13A sockets, special power, and organiser connection fees.

fallback_line_items.description: Vinyl graphics for fascia, panels and backdrops
